title: Battle of Jabiim (disambiguation)
content:
The planet '''[[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]]''' experienced several battles in its history, including the following:
==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Attack on Jabiim]]''', an [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] assault on a [[Hidden Path]] base

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
'''[[New Sith Wars]]'''
:*[[Battle of Jabiim (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Jabiim]]
'''[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]'''
:*[[Battle of Jabiim]], c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]
:*[[Battle at Jabiim (Outer Rim Sieges)|Battle of Jabiim]], between [[20 BBY/Legends|20]] and [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]; part of the [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]
'''[[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]'''
:*A [[Battle at Jabiim|battle]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]
:*[[Subjugation of Jabiim]]

==Out of universe==
*'''''[[Star Wars: Republic: The Battle of Jabiim]]'''''
